title: Software Update - DFU - Charge Case at low battery - Software update tab in device settings
scenario: Verify DFU is blocked with a popup when charge case battery is low (<5%) and not plugged in, but proceeds successfully once the charge case is connected to a charger.
steps: 1. Ensure the charge case battery is low (less than 5%) and NOT plugged into a charger.
2. Attempt to perform a DFU (Device Firmware Update) on the headset.
3. Observe the popup message displayed on the screen.
4. Plug the charge case into a charger.
6. Observe whether the DFU proceeds and completes successfully.
expected: When the charge case is at low battery and not plugged in, a popup should appear saying "Update currently not available, please try back later". Once the charge case is plugged into a charger, the DFU should proceed and complete successfully.
